creator: saper@saper.info
text:
This error is not related to the FreeBSD www/npm package - it is an error in the C++ code of the "shiny-server" npm package.

I, too, cannot compile it with node-0.12.0 at all (due to node API change I think).

I would report this bug to:

https://github.com/rstudio/shiny-server/issues

You might want to run npm install with V=1:

$ env V=1 npm -g install shiny-server
